summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new OLAP Assistant features. All new functionality working correctly: CSV export, query bookmarking, multiple chart types (bar, pie, line, area), chart/table tab switching, and Emergent branding removal.

design_issues.issue: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) but charts display correctly

passed_tests: Export CSV button appears when results are displayed
Export CSV button functionality works (triggers download)
Save/Bookmark button appears when results are displayed
Bookmark functionality saves queries to localStorage
Bookmarked queries appear in Saved Queries section
Saved Queries section shows correct count (1)
Clicking saved query reruns the analysis
Chart Type dropdown appears with results
Chart Type dropdown contains Bar, Pie, Line, Area options
Bar Chart option works and displays correctly
Pie Chart option works and displays correctly
Line Chart option works and displays correctly
Area Chart option works and displays correctly
Chart/Table tabs are visible and functional
Table tab displays data in tabular format
Chart tab displays data in chart format
Tab switching works smoothly between Chart and Table views
NO Emergent branding visible anywhere on the page
Page title shows 'OLAP Assistant' (no Emergent branding)
Header shows 'OLAP Assistant' (no Emergent branding)
Natural language OLAP queries work correctly with new features
Query: 'Show top 5 products by revenue' processed successfully
Analysis results show detailed LLM response and data visualization
OLAP operation badges display correctly (AGGREGATE)
Dimensions and filters display correctly in results

success_percentage.integration: 100% (Natural language processing and data visualization working)
